description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a sleek, streamlined profile and a matte black finish. The stock is solid and angular, extending into a long, slender barrel with no visible ribbing or venting. The receiver area is slightly raised and metallic, contrasting subtly with the darker synthetic stock and fore-end. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. There are no visible external hammers, levers, or pumps, suggesting a simple, clean design. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, matte black shotgun with a solid stock and long, slender barrel, featuring a rounded trigger guard and a streamlined, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the solid stock, long barrel, and the raised receiver area.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow barrel profile and the symmetry of the stock and fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of the first side, with clear visibility of the stock and barrel alignment.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, showing the shotgun's width and symmetry.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
